title: URGENT!! Service Engineer (LTSA / Gas Turbine Combined Cycle)
description:
Job description

Job Descriptions:

Customer Support & Technical Advisory (40%)

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with customers to understand and resolve technical issues.

  • Respond to internal and external requests using engineering knowledge and analytical skills.

  • Prepare and present technical instructions, procedures, reports, specifications, and proposals.

  • Communicate proactively to implement technical updates that enhance plant performance.

  • Identify potential equipment issues via remote monitoring and collaborate on preventive or corrective actions.

  • Analyze and report RAM (Reliability, Availability, Maintainability) data and other KPIs; recommend corrective actions.

  • Support aftermarket sales opportunities.

  • Travel to customer sites in Singapore for project or technical meetings.

Maintenance Coordination (40%)

  • Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders, including service engineers, repair facilities, and vendors.

  • Plan and communicate schedules for planned and unplanned maintenance.

  • Coordinate dispatch of parts and technical advisory services.

  • Provide technical advisory support for maintenance activities.

Emergency & Troubleshooting Support (20%)

  • Respond to plant emergencies beyond normal working hours, providing on-site troubleshooting and technical advice.

  • Communicate failure data and operational findings between customer and internal teams.

  • Lead or support root cause analysis to identify failure causes and recommend countermeasures.

  • Investigate maintenance-related problems and provide urgent solutions.

  • Summarize findings in clear, concise reports for stakeholders.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Degree in engineering or a relevant technical field.

  • Minimum 3 years’ experience with Gas Turbines, Steam Turbines, or large rotating equipment in design, installation, commissioning, operation, or maintenance.

  • Customer service experience in plant environments.

  • Hands-on troubleshooting and plant restoration experience.

  • Experience liaising with Field Service and Engineering teams to resolve technical issues.

  • Technical knowledge of Gas/Steam Turbines, Turbine Generators, large-scale rotating equipment, control systems, and auxiliary equipment.

  • Ability to write clear technical documentation (instructions, procedures, reports, proposals).


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” and provide the below details in your resume.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
